test_endpoint_invalid_body.error: In production, webhook URL host must be hooks.slack.com

changes_made.description: Added Mode 0: dryRun/endpoint format support (no-auth dry-run). Accepts { dryRun, endpoint: { type, url }, message } — validates endpoint.type must be slack_webhook, always enforces hooks.slack.com host for endpoint.url (regardless of VERCEL_ENV), applies per-IP rate limiting, returns { ok, dryRun, validated } on dry-run.

notes: Diagnostics returns 401 (expected, protected with DIAGNOSTICS_KEY/CRON_SECRET). GET /api/notifications/test returns 401 (unauthenticated GET falls through to auth check — no 5xx). Settings page loads 200 with Slack content. All success criteria met.
